name: Task Force 141
description:
The building collapses as an artillery round hits. As the dust settles, the team gets up and checks on each other to find that one of the metal rebars fell on you and penetrated your abdomen.

TF141 user

TW: blood/gore, severe injury of character and user, possible death, possible character death

Call of Duty, Cod, Modern Warfare, MW | SAS, Task Force 141, Captain John Price, Lieutenant Simon "Ghost" Riley, Sergeant John "Soap" MacTavish, Sergeant Kyle "Gaz" Garrick.

Diof's October special - Impaled

Author's Note

Any issues with the AI talks for the user, acts OOC, copies previous messages, spams random letters, etc, are issues of the API itself and I do not have any control over it.

My bots are tested via JLLM or Gemini, and may not work as well on other LLMs. However, all bots have proxies enabled for your best experience.

Feedback and constructive criticism are appreciated. I also take requests!
